iran_nuke.notes: Day 17 00:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Iran remains at 60% enrichment, IAEA access denied. Nuclear dimension remains latent while conventional war dominates. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 17 01:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). FM Araghchi now REJECTS dialogue with US (CBS) — reverses earlier safe passage signal. Iran claims 700 missiles + 3,600 drones fired since war start. Pentagon deploys 5,000 additional sailors/Marines. Macron calls Pezeshkian, demands end to Gulf attacks. IRGC vow to kill Netanyahu reiterated. 6 US troops dead in Iraq KC-135 crash. UAE: 282 missiles, 1,500+ drones, 6 killed, 130+ wounded. 5,000+ targets struck in Iran. EL AL evac flights for US citizens begin Monday. 100 (capped, stable).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 17 00:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). 826-850 killed per AJ/health ministry. Fresh evacuation warnings Beirut suburbs. No ceasefire signals. IDF ground ops continue in southern Lebanon. 100 (capped, stable).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Trump NATO Hormuz threat could further strain NATO cohesion. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. No new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. US-China trade talks in Paris continue. Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over Hormuz. 11 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 12x 600mm MRL test (3rd provocation this week). No new provocations in last 8h. 55 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 17 00:00 — IMMINENT 88 (RISING). Russia fired 68 missiles + 430 drones + 1,530 KABs in past week. 6 killed Saturday in Kyiv region strikes. Zaporizhzhia residential area hit — 1 killed, 18 wounded incl. 2 children. Poland scrambled jets. Moldova reports Russian drone intruding airspace. Ukraine strikes Iskander launcher + storage in Crimea. UK considering sending interceptor drones to ME, potentially diverting from Ukraine. 88 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 17 00:00 — IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE). Pakistan hits Kandahar militant hideouts again. No ceasefire. Fighting shows no letup (Guardian/AP). Taliban responds with attacks on Pakistani positions in Kandahar + Helmand. Qatar-brokered Oct ceasefire fully collapsed. 99 (capped, stable).

top_signals: Trump warns NATO faces 'very bad' future if allies refuse to help open Strait of Hormuz — most explicit NATO-coercion threat yet (FT/Guardian)
Israel projects 3+ more weeks of war, 'identifying new targets daily' — longest official timeline from IDF (CNN/Guardian)
6 US service members killed in aircraft crash in Iraq — mounting US casualties (AP)
Iran open to safe passage Hormuz talks — first softening signal on Strait closure (AJ/Guardian)
Russia fires 68 missiles + 430 drones at Ukraine in single Saturday — massive aerial bombardment continues (Guardian/Reuters)
Ukraine strikes Iskander launcher + storage in Crimea — deep strike campaign intensifying (NV/ISW)
Pakistan Kandahar strikes continue, Taliban retaliates — no ceasefire in sight (Guardian/AP)
Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over China's Hormuz inaction (FT)

new: fm_rejects_dialogue activated — Iran FM Araghchi explicitly rejects dialogue with US, reversing earlier safe passage overture (CBS)
pentagon_troop_surge_5000 activated — Pentagon deploying 5,000 additional sailors and Marines to Middle East (CBS/Pentagon)
removed: hormuz_safe_passage_talks deactivated — Iran FM now rejects dialogue, reversing earlier softening signal on Hormuz safe passage (CBS)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
HARDENING (Day 17 01:00):
- DE-ESCALATION SIGNAL COLLAPSED: Hormuz safe passage talks removed — FM Araghchi now explicitly rejects dialogue with US (CBS). The one softening signal from Tehran has been walked back within hours.
- ESCALATION CONTINUES: Pentagon surges 5,000 additional troops. Iran claims 700 missiles + 3,600 drones fired total. Macron demands Iran 'immediately' end Gulf attacks. 282 missiles + 1,500+ drones hit UAE (6 killed, 130+ wounded). Israel completes 400+ airstrike waves. EL AL runs evac flights for US citizens.
- PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: 75+ civilians killed by Pakistani airstrikes, 115,000 displaced (NYT). No ceasefire in sight. Sharpest escalation yet (AJ).
- NET: Safe passage signal was the only de-escalation vector from Iran. Its collapse within hours suggests Tehran is hardening position, not softening. All trajectories remain hostile.
changed_signals.synagogue_note: US domestic: Michigan synagogue suspect's brother confirmed by IDF as Hezbollah commander killed in Israeli airstrike. Links domestic terrorism directly to ME conflict blowback.

latest_news.headline: Trump threatens NATO 'very bad' future if allies refuse Hormuz help
latest_news.text: Trump told FT that NATO faces a 'very bad' future if US allies fail to assist opening Strait of Hormuz. Also threatens to delay Xi summit over China's inaction. Most explicit NATO-coercion threat in this conflict.

latest_news.headline: Israel projects 3+ more weeks of war, 'identifying new targets daily'
latest_news.text: IDF tells CNN it has a list of targets that will take at least three more weeks to hit. 'Not working according to a stopwatch but to achieve our goals' — weaken Iranian regime severely.

latest_news.headline: 6 US service members killed in aircraft crash in Iraq
latest_news.text: Six US service members including a mother from Kentucky killed in air crash in Iraq. Mounting US casualties add domestic political pressure.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM REJECTS dialogue with US — reverses safe passage signal
latest_news.text: Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi explicitly rejects talk of dialogue with US as strikes continue. Reverses earlier signal about being open to Hormuz safe passage discussions. Tehran hardening position.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon deploys 5,000 additional troops to Middle East
latest_news.text: Pentagon plans to send up to 5,000 additional sailors and Marines to Middle East. Rep. Crenshaw says it's 'not boots on ground deployment' but could include evacuation ops from Gulf allies.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan airstrikes kill 75+ civilians in Afghanistan, 115K displaced
latest_news.text: Pakistani airstrikes have killed at least 75 civilians and displaced 115,000 in Afghanistan. Both sides vowing escalation with no talks in sight. Sharpest single escalation yet in the conflict.

latest_news.headline: Russia fires 68 missiles + 430 drones at Ukraine in single day
latest_news.text: Russia hammered Ukraine with 68 missiles and about 430 drones Saturday. 6 killed in Kyiv region. Zaporizhzhia residential area hit — 1 killed, 18 wounded. Poland scrambled jets. Moldova reports drone intruding its airspace.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine strikes Iskander launcher in Crimea + deep strikes campaign
latest_news.text: Ukraine struck Iskander-M launcher preparing to fire from occupied Vyshneve (209km from front) and storage site in Crimea. Intensifying mid-range strike campaign ahead of expected Russian spring offensive.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan continues Kandahar strikes, no ceasefire in sight
latest_news.text: Pakistan says it hit militant hideouts in Kandahar as fighting shows no letup. Taliban retaliates with attacks on Pakistani positions in Kandahar and Helmand. Qatar-brokered October ceasefire fully collapsed.

latest_news.headline: Michigan synagogue attack — suspect's family killed in Israeli strike
latest_news.text: Ayman Ghazali (41) attacked Temple Israel synagogue outside Detroit after learning 4 family members killed in Israeli strike. IDF claims his brother was Hezbollah commander. Raises domestic blowback concerns.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability 88% (Day 17 01:00). DAY 17 CONTINUES: (1) IRAN -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): FM Araghchi rejects US dialogue — safe passage signal collapsed within hours. Pentagon surges 5,000 troops. Iran claims 700 missiles + 3,600 drones fired total. Macron demands Iran 'immediately' end Gulf attacks. UAE: 282 missiles, 1,500+ drones, 6 killed, 130+ wounded. Israel completes 400+ airstrike waves. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): 850+ dead. No ceasefire. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE -> IMMINENT 93 (RISING): 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday. Ukraine deep strikes intensify. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN -> IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE): 75+ civilians killed, 115K displaced. No ceasefire. (5) RUSSIA -> IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY -> IMMINENT 78. (7) DPRK -> CRITICAL 55 (STABLE). (8) INDIA -> ELEVATED 25. KEY WATCH: The one de-escalation vector from Iran — Hormuz safe passage talks — collapsed within hours as FM rejects dialogue. Tehran is hardening, not softening. Pentagon troop surge signals US commitment to sustained campaign. Israel projects 3+ more weeks minimum. All trajectories remain hostile with no diplomatic off-ramp visible.
